---
title: "Home"
body-class: homepage
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.homepage-hero-section}

::: {.homepage-tagline-card}
::: {.homepage-tagline}
[Clarity]{.homepage-tagline-em} at every stage of your [data journey]{.homepage-tagline-em}
:::
:::

::: {.homepage-intro-row}
::: {.homepage-hero-content}
![](assets/homepage_portrait.jpg){.homepage-hero-photo}

::: {.homepage-hero-text}
Hello!👋 I’m Kevin - a data, spatial, and research professional with experience across municipal, federal, and academic environments. I help teams make sense of complex population, demographic, and administrative data at every stage of the data journey, from collection and governance to analysis, design, and communication. My work blends rigorous methods with practical decision support, and I enjoy helping organizations understand systems and move forward with clarity and confidence.

:::
:::

::: {.homepage-cred}
::: {.homepage-cred-item}
**How I Work**

- Clarity and transparency in every step
- Rigorous methods with practical outcomes
- Strong documentation and reproducible workflows
- Collaborative, stakeholder‑aligned approach
- Ethical, governance‑minded practice

:::

:::
:::

:::

::: {.homepage-focus}


::: {.homepage-pillars}
::: {.homepage-pillar}
::: {.homepage-pillar-index}
01
:::
**Understanding systems through data**  
Using spatial and non‑spatial population, demographic, and administrative data to reveal patterns, relationships, and system‑level dynamics.
:::

::: {.homepage-pillar}
::: {.homepage-pillar-index}
02
:::
**Designing research and analytical approaches**  
Building the right questions, methods, and workflows to make sense of complex problems, whether the data is messy, incomplete, or multi‑source.
:::

::: {.homepage-pillar}
::: {.homepage-pillar-index}
03
:::
**Turning insight into action**  
Translating complex findings into clear guidance, decision support, and practical recommendations that help teams move forward with confidence.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.homepage-explore}
::: {.homepage-explore-inner}
### Explore my work {.homepage-explore-title}

Projects in analytical design, automation, and data‑driven problem solving across domains

[Browse projects](projects/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .homepage-explore-btn}
:::
:::
